Law firm team structure and staff access layer.

PARTNER NETWORK
Partner Home Registration Verification Staff Management

Law Firm Staff Management

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Staff Management

Firm Team Login Structure

This layer allows senior advocates and law firms to create access for junior advocates, associates, front desk, client support and consultation operators.

Suggested Staff Roles

  • Senior Advocate
  • Junior Advocate
  • Associate Lawyer
  • Consultation Desk
  • Front Office / Intake Staff
  • Billing and Documentation Staff

Create Staff Access
